title: Varlink API - GetEvents not working on Ubuntu
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->
call to GetEvents on Ubuntu only return a system events, instead of what `podman stats` output

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. On Ubuntu 18.04, installed by kubic

2. varlink call unix:/run/podman/io.podman/io.podman.GetEvents "{}"

**Describe the results you received:**
`{
  "events": {
    "id": "",
    "image": "",
    "name": "",
    "status": "refresh",
    "time": "2020-05-19T11:21:02.485891823+08:00",
    "type": "system"
  }
}`

**Describe the results you expected:**
things like what `podman events` generate

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.9.2
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.11.6
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
debug:
  compiler: gc
  gitCommit: ""
  goVersion: go1.11.6
  podmanVersion: 1.9.2
host:
  arch: amd64
  buildahVersion: 1.14.8
  cgroupVersion: v1
  conmon:
    package: 'conmon: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon'
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.16, commit: '
  cpus: 40
  distribution:
    distribution: ubuntu
    version: "18.04"
  eventLogger: file
  hostname: T440B
  idMappings:
    gidmap: null
    uidmap: null
  kernel: 4.15.0-99-generic
  memFree: 49546964992
  memTotal: 66975105024
  ociRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: 'containerd.io: /usr/bin/runc'
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: |-
      runc version 1.0.0-rc10
      commit: dc9208a3303feef5b3839f4323d9beb36df0a9dd
      spec: 1.0.1-dev
  os: linux
  rootless: false
  slirp4netns:
    executable: ""
    package: ""
    version: ""
  swapFree: 65534947328
  swapTotal: 65534947328
  uptime: 145h 58m 23.8s (Approximately 6.04 days)
registries:
  search:
  - docker.io
  - quay.io
store:
  configFile: /etc/containers/storage.conf
  containerStore:
    number: 0
    paused: 0
    running: 0
    stopped: 0
  graphDriverName: overlay
  graphOptions: {}
  graphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  graphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: extfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "false"
  imageStore:
    number: 2
  runRoot: /var/run/containers/storage
  volumePath: /var/lib/containers/storage/volumes

```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
正在列表... 完成
podman/未知 1.9.2~3 armhf
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
physical

well, guess I've figured it out, might because of the `events_logger` configuration. also is `libpod.conf` replaced by `containers.conf`?
turn out to be my unknown about varlink, need to use `more` parameter to get stream data.
